# libredash data sync

Stage a managed data revision

## Usage

```sh
libredash data sync [flags]
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--connection` | string | `` | project-global managed connection |
| `--from` | string | `` | local filesystem root to ingest |
| `--project` | string | `dashboards/libredash.yaml` | project catalog path |
| `--target` | string | `` | LibreDash server URL |
| `--token` | string | `` | API token |
